body:

A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB250412.46 (trigger No 766148493,18h 37m 40.08s , -21d 24m 00.0s, R=27.37) errorbox  71363 sec after notice time and 71412 sec after trigger time at 2025-04-13 06:51:41 UT, with upper limit up to  19.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 22 deg. The sun  altitude  is -51.4 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -7 deg., longitude l = 13 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2840647

We obtain a following upper limits.
